name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                /\ forks' = forks
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = -1
                /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* TypeOK ensures that q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 0..K-1, and count is an integer in 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* The queue is represented as a circular buffer of length K. head points to the next element to consume, tail points to the next slot to produce. count tracks the number of elements in the queue. *)

Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ count = 0

Producer == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, new_item)  (* new_item is a placeholder for the produced value *)
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ consumed_item = Head(q)  (* consumed_item is a placeholder for the consumed value *)
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
              /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> [msg \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> [msg \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN [msg \in 1..N |-> FALSE] ELSE messages[i] ]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks, fileChunks

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> TRUE]

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] <= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState[i] = TRUE
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] <= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState[i] = FALSE
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] > MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState' = channelState

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>
